text_block_list.text: —I am currently facing a harsh reality. I hadn't checked in a while, but—I never thought it would come to this…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Um! Is something troubling you?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You have such a serious look on your face. If you don't mind, would you like to talk about it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I see… 
Before you knew it, your weight has—
Even as a trainer, working hard with my Horsegirl every day builds up quite an appetite…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It's really hard to hold back from eating what you want, isn't it…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …If you'd like, could I help you out? I know a thing or two about weight-loss menus and such.
choice_data_list: No, you don't have to go that far—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But I can't just leave you be…! 
Please, let me help.
…And so, though I felt incredibly guilty about it, she ended up supporting my personal diet—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Let's head out for a jog right away! …Ah! We'll just be going for a light run, of course!
She went out of her way to jog with me in the morning—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. 
I made you a bento.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It's low in calories, but I made sure it has plenty of dietary fiber so you won't get hungry easily. Make sure to chew your food thoroughly!
…She was being as supportive as she could possibly be.
But at the same time, a dark, lowly, and helpless desire was welling up inside me.
If I went down to the cafeteria below, I could unleash this desire to my heart's content. But… However…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: U-Um!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: If you'd like, would you want to eat lunch together today?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I made simmered Koyadofu the main dish 
for today. I let the flavor soak in reeeally well.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Let's chew our food thoroughly together! One, two, three, four…—

—It's as delicious as always. But… 
There's no denying this feels like the diet of an ascetic monk—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Ahaha. 
Dieting really is tough, isn't it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, when you're hungry, 
you want to eat your favorite foods. 
But you have to… Hold back on that.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: But even if your stomach isn't quite satisfied—at the very least.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I thought that if we enjoyed a meal together like this—it might fill up your heart.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hehe. I hope it did.

And so—thanks to Buena Vista's devotion, 
I was able to safely reach my target weight.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness…! 
You worked really hard, Trainer…!
Reaching my goal safely was undoubtedly all thanks to Buena Vista. I couldn't possibly thank her enou—

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Hehe. It seems your stomach was so relieved that it ended up letting its guard down.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: If you'd like, I can always make you more. Though it might be a bit low on calories… Hehe.

It was a moment where I experienced 
Buena Vista's boundless kindness—
…But deep down, that desire reared its ugly head once more.
choice_data_list: (Even if I overeat… Just a little bit—)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …You want to eat a whole bunch, right? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It's okay. Even if by some chance you gain weight again, I'll be right here to help you out.

It was a moment where I experienced 
Buena Vista's boundless kindness—
